title: Order on $ $
statement:
Define $\leq_{\mathbb{W}}$ on $\mathbb{W}$ by declaring
\[
0\leq_{\mathbb{W}}a\quad(a\in\mathbb{W}),
\]
and, for $a,b\in\mathbb{N}$,
\[
a\leq_{\mathbb{W}}b
\quad\Longleftrightarrow\quad
a\leq_{\mathbb{N}}b.
\]

current_dependencies.title: Less Than or Equal on a Peano System
